name: Ceylon Woven and Wood Dining Chair Brown/Natural - Threshold™
description:
Bring distinctive style to your dining space with the Ceylon Woven Dining Chair from Threshold™. Featuring a sturdy frame in a natural finish, this wooden dining chair lends an earthy touch to your space, while the seat and backrest are accented with woven detailing in bonded leather for a homey twist. This armless chair provides the perfect spot to sit whether you're enjoying a meal or chatting with friends — simply pair it with a light brown table for coordinated look, or style with a colorful dining table to show off your eclectic taste.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 19. 5 inches
Overall Height: 35 inches
Overall Depth (at floor): 21.5 inches
Seat depth: 18 inches
Seat height: 18 inches
